rules.objective: Win by reaching the kill limit first or by having more kills when time expires.
rules.friendly_kill_penalty: Friendly kill can add score to the opposing team and subtract score from the friendly-kill team.

qa_relevance: TDM is useful for repeated movement/combat scenarios.
Deaths and respawns can desync replay paths, so short scenarios are recommended for the first MVP.
Replay success should be judged by repeated execution and captured evidence, not by identical game state.
